missions.name: Saturn Haul Cycle
missions.briefing: Pilot. Got a standard gather cycle out in the Saturn co-orbitals — heavy regolith, routine volume, good rates if you move clean. Not a complicated job. Land, fill the hold, come back. Comm me when you dock. — Finch

missions.name: Gravimetric Pass, Saturn Trojans
missions.briefing: Pilot. Three-stage gravimetric pass on a candidate body in the Saturn co-orbitals. Probe calibration, standard hold times. The rock's well-behaved — good surface, clean approach. If the data comes back clean I've got more of the same. Standard rate plus travel. — Finch

missions.name: Photometric Certification Run
missions.briefing: Pilot. Buyer wants a certified photometric pass before they commit to extraction. Standoff approach, probe deploy, hold the lander stable through the exposure. Nothing unusual about the body — just needs a clean telemetry packet. Pays above standard because of the distance. Come back with good data. — Finch
